engineering.title: Development Support
engineering.description: Full-stack development across Java, Python, Node.js, Angular, and React. From feature builds to complex refactors, we write production-grade code that ships.

details.subtitle: Plug senior engineers directly into your product backlog without the delay of building a full in-house delivery team first.

sections.title: Best For
items: Feature delivery on production products
Refactors, stabilisation, and modernization work
Backend APIs, admin portals, and customer-facing web apps

sections.title: Included
items: Architecture review before implementation
Production-grade code delivery with documentation
PR support, bug fixes, and iteration rounds

engineering.title: DevOps Support
engineering.description: CI/CD pipelines, containerization (Docker/ECS/K8s), IaC with Terraform, GitLab/GitHub Actions automation. We make your deployments bulletproof.

details.subtitle: A delivery-focused DevOps retainer for teams that want cleaner releases, stronger environments, and fewer manual handoffs.

sections.title: Core Coverage
items: CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Jenkins
Docker, container build optimization, and deployment workflows
Infrastructure as code with Terraform and environment automation

sections.title: Typical Outcomes
items: Faster releases with fewer broken deployments
More repeatable environments across dev, staging, and prod
Clear documentation for operations handoff and scaling

engineering.title: Bootcamp Service
engineering.description: Hands-on monthly boot camp with guided learning, practical implementation, job support, and real-world engineering workflows.

details.subtitle: A practical cohort-style service for people who want to build real engineering muscle, not just watch recorded tutorials.

sections.title: Tracks You Can Choose
items: DevOps development
AWS Cloud Practitioner course
DevOps course

sections.title: What We Cover
items: Practical implementations instead of theory-only sessions
Architecture diagrams and high-level architecture walkthroughs
Day-to-day work simulation, homework, and guided revisions
Job application support with selected opportunity submissions

sections.title: Docker & Pipeline Curriculum
items: Docker fundamentals, images, containers, Compose, and registries
CI/CD pipeline implementation with GitHub Actions and Jenkins
Linux, Git, cloud deployment basics, and release flow habits

sections.title: Deliverables
items: Session notes and implementation references
Hands-on assignments with review feedback
Support material that helps learners prepare for interviews and real projects

engineering.title: SRE Support
engineering.description: Monitoring (Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog), incident response, SLA management, and reliability engineering. We keep your systems running at 99.99%.

details.subtitle: Reliability engineering support for teams that are scaling fast and need stronger visibility, incident response, and operational discipline.

sections.title: Included
items: Observability design with Prometheus, Grafana, and Datadog
Incident response workflows and alert tuning
SLA-minded reliability reviews and system hardening

sections.title: Ideal For
items: Production services with uptime pressure
Teams suffering from noisy alerts or weak visibility
Companies that want more disciplined ops before scaling further

engineering.title: Data Engineering
engineering.description: ETL/ELT pipelines, data warehousing, Spark, Airflow, dbt, and cloud-native data architectures. We turn raw data into business intelligence.

details.subtitle: Build clean, reliable data movement and reporting foundations without assembling a separate platform team first.

sections.title: Coverage
items: Pipelines, warehousing, Spark, Airflow, and dbt workflows
Data model reviews and reporting-readiness improvements
Cloud-native patterns for analytics and operational insights

engineering.title: Data Analyst
engineering.description: Business intelligence dashboards, SQL analytics, reporting automation, and data visualization with Tableau, Power BI, and Looker.

details.subtitle: An analytics support lane for founders and teams that need reporting clarity fast.

sections.title: Typical Work
items: SQL-based reporting and dashboard design
Power BI, Tableau, and Looker setup or cleanup
Recurring insight packs for business and operations reviews

engineering.title: Interview Support
engineering.description: One-on-one mock interviews, system design reviews, coding walkthroughs, and real-time technical coaching to help you land the role.

details.subtitle: Focused support for candidates who want tighter interview performance in technical rounds, system design, and practical engineering discussions.

sections.title: Includes
items: Mock interviews and feedback
System design guidance and coding walkthroughs
Targeted prep based on the role you are applying for

career.title: Job Applying Support
career.description: We handle the job pipeline. Targeted applications with full tracking across applied, responded, and status updates.
features: Targeted job applications on your behalf

details.subtitle: A lean support plan for candidates who already have the skills and need structured outbound application help.

sections.title: Included
items: Curated role targeting and application pipeline execution
Application status tracking and weekly updates
Feedback loop to improve targeting quality

career.title: Resume & LinkedIn Optimization
career.description: ATS-optimized resume rewrites, LinkedIn profile overhauls, and ongoing updates.

details.subtitle: The profile-polish lane for candidates who need stronger positioning before serious outreach begins.

sections.title: Included
items: Resume rewrite aligned to target roles
LinkedIn headline, about, and experience refresh
Positioning updates as your profile evolves

career.title: Full Job Search Management
career.description: An all-in-one job support package covering learning support, interview preparation, selected job applications, and profile upgrades.
features: Structured job search and selected application support
Learning materials, notes, and study guides

details.subtitle: A more guided monthly lane for candidates who want support across profile, prep, and opportunity flow without going all the way to placement guarantee.

sections.title: Best For
items: Candidates switching roles or domains
People who need both profile improvement and interview support
Professionals who want guided momentum every week

career.title: End-to-End Placement Support
career.description: The premium outcome package covering skills, learning, resume upgrades, LinkedIn optimization, applications, and placement support with a partial refund promise.
features: Everything in Full Job Search Management
Learning roadmap and accountability for the full month
Job opportunity sourcing and guided submissions
50% refundable if placement does not occur

details.subtitle: A higher-touch placement-oriented service for candidates who want full-spectrum execution and accountability.

sections.title: What This Covers
items: Skill-upgrade guidance, interview prep, and job application help
Resume and LinkedIn upgrades aligned to the target market
Hands-on placement support through the engagement

If placement does not occur, 50% of the amount is refundable
